name: p_14_1_selection_sort_desc_seq
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that implements the selection sort algorithm to sort an array of integers in descending order.

ensures: forall i, j :: 0 <= i < j < |inputs| ==> sorted[i] >= sorted[j]

name: p_14_1_selection_sort_desc_array
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that implements the selection sort algorithm to sort an array of integers in descending order.

ensures: forall i, j :: 0 <= i < j < inputs.Length ==> sorted[i] >= sorted[j]

name: p_14_4_merge_sort_lexicographic_seq
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that implements the merge sort algorithm to sort an array of strings in lexicographic order.

ensures: forall i, j :: 0 <= i < j < |inputs| ==> sorted[i] <= sorted[j]
forall i :: 0 <= i < |inputs| ==> exists j :: 0 <= j < |sorted| && inputs[i] == sorted[j]

name: p_14_4_merge_sort_lexicographic_array
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that implements the merge sort algorithm to sort an array of strings in lexicographic order.

ensures: forall i, j :: 0 <= i < j < inputs.Length ==> sorted[i] <= sorted[j]
forall i :: 0 <= i < inputs.Length ==> exists j :: 0 <= j < sorted.Length && inputs[i] == sorted[j]
